title: pelargonium × malachrifolium
intro: Pelargonium × malachrifolium, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species in the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium lanigatum. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and aiding in the relief of menstrual cramps, digestive problems, and skin issues. Rose Geranium can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, which are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
